name: Cabbage Roll Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook Time: 1 hour
- Preheat oven to 325°F.
- In a large frying pan, brown the hamburger in oil for a few minutes.
- Add onion, salt, and pepper; cook until onion is translucent.
- Add rice and mix well.
- Stir in tomato soup and water.
- Place cabbage on top of the mixture in an oven-safe baking dish.
- Bake uncovered at 325°F for 1 hour.
